payload.description: Remove custom plugin loading (v0.1 builtin-only, F12) — re-scoped from 2026-07-06-plugin-loading-removal to also cover the 3 runtime-caller stale-comment files

payload.reason: Re-scope of the already twice-reviewed plan (prior slug 2026-07-06-plugin-loading-removal): identical design + Task 11 folding in 3 runtime-caller stale-comment files (comment/docstring accuracy + narrowing two dead except tuples; no behavior change). Delta is documentation-only.

Codex delta-review MAJOR: narrowing AttributeError out of the sync.py/agents_md_render.py except tuples is NOT behavior-preserving — load_adapters/load_components do cfg.get() on yaml.safe_load result, so a top-level non-dict yaml (bare list/scalar) raises AttributeError. Root fix: guard 'cfg must be a mapping' in both loaders (raise ValueError), making the narrowed tuples + comments correct. Add tests for top-level non-dict.

Code review converged (Claude + Codex, multi-round). Delta-review earned its keep: caught AttributeError leak (root-fixed via cfg-is-dict guard) + comment-accuracy; narrowing to config-driven exception surface is deliberate (builtin-constructor bugs fail loud, not swallowed). Codex final: no remaining defect.

checklist.note: F12 objective met: exec_module primitive deleted, all three loaders builtin-only, non-builtin raises before enabled skip. Plus the re-scoped Task 11 (stale exception-family comments in the 3 runtime callers).
All changed files within the re-declared 23-file scope. Re-scoped from the abandoned slug 2026-07-06-plugin-loading-removal because the harness has no verb to widen scope from READY_TO_MERGE.

Two-actor plan review (2 rounds) + code review across multiple rounds. Codex delta-review caught a real AttributeError leak (top-level non-dict yaml via cfg.get) -> root-fixed with a cfg-is-dict guard in both loaders. The narrowed except tuples are a deliberate design choice (catch config-driven failures; let a builtin-constructor code bug fail loud rather than mislabel it "unreadable") documented in the comments; Codex confirmed no remaining correctness defect. ruff + mypy clean; git diff --check clean.

Security regression tests prove no-exec across adapter type framework/agent x {builtin:false, key omitted, disabled}; sensors/gates dict entries; truthy-non-bool builtin; corrupt yaml -> EXIT_VALIDATION; top-level non-mapping (list/scalar/int) -> ValueError; package-wide structural guard. 1625 tests pass.
limitations.md documents custom plugins as v0.2+; cli-reference.md regenerated; module/internal docstrings + the 3 runtime-caller comments updated to the current builtin-only exception surface.
